inputs.label: Distance Between Stations
inputs.businessContext: Distance along the alignment between the two cross-sections.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance along the alignment between the two cross-sections.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İki kesit arasındaki hat boyunca mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand entlang der Trasse zwischen den beiden Querschnitten.

businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia a lo largo del alineamiento entre las dos secciones transversales.

inputs.label: Shrinkage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Shrinkage factor (e.g., 0.9 for 10% shrinkage, 1.0 for no shrinkage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Shrinkage factor (e.g., 0.9 for 10% shrinkage, 1.0 for no shrinkage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büzülme faktörü (örneğin, %10 büzülme için 0.9, büzülme yoksa 1.0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schwindfaktor (z. B. 0,9 für 10 % Schwindung, 1,0 für keine Schwindung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de retrait (ex. 0,9 pour 10% de retrait, 1,0 pour aucun retrait).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de contracción (ej. 0.9 para 10% de contracción, 1.0 sin contracción).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الانكماش (مثال: 0.9 يعني انكماش 10%، 1.0 يعني عدم وجود انكماش).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
